_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warlock family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_healthstone: Healthstone USE spell (5512) returned 'Fill Phial' SPELLFAMILY_GENERIC (0) — not a Warlock family spell. A Warlock SpellMod can only target Warlock family spells; the Healthstone consumption spell is unreachable. id=280 moved to _todo.

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Healthstone (2r, tier 1 or 2) — HP restored by Healthstone +10%/rank. The Healthstone consumption spell (5512) is SPELLFAMILY_GENERIC — it cannot be targeted by a Warlock family SpellMod. Not implementable.
Demonic Embrace (5r, tier 1) — Increases Stamina by 1/2/3/4/5% and reduces Spirit by 1%. Passive stat bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Health Funnel
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16777216,0,0]=0x01000000 (mask0 bit24). No shared Warlock marker bits. Health Funnel transfer amount +10%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Voidwalker (3r, tier 2) — Increases effectiveness of Voidwalker's Suffering by 10/20/30%. Pet ability, not player SpellMod.
Fel Intellect (3r, tier 2) — Increases Intellect of summoned demons by 5/10/15%. Pet stat bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Succubus (3r, tier 3) — Increases duration of Seduction by 15/30/45%. Pet ability, not player SpellMod.
Fel Domination (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Demonic Aegis
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,536870944,0]: OR of Demon Armor(706) mask1 bit5(0x20=32)|Fel Armor(28176) mask1 bit29(0x20000000=536870912). No shared Warlock marker bits. DA EFFECT1=armor bonus, FA EFFECT1=spell power bonus — both boosted proportionally, which is the intended talent behavior.

talent_affixes._todo: Master Summoner (2r, tier 4) — Reduces cast time for summoning demons by 2s/rank and mana cost by 20%/rank. Two different ops (CASTING_TIME + COST) on summon spells — complex; defer until summon spell flags are verified.
Unholy Power (5r, tier 4) — Increases damage done by Voidwalker/Felguard by 4%/rank. Pet damage bonus, not player SpellMod.
Master Demonologist (5r, tier 4) — Passive bonuses while specific pets are active. Aura-conditional, not implementable as SpellMod.
Demonic Sacrifice (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Mana Feed (3r, tier 5) — When pet critically strikes, restores 4/8/12% mana. Pet proc, not player SpellMod.
Demonic Knowledge (3r, tier 5) — Increases spell power by 4/8/12% of pet's Stamina+Intellect. Passive stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Enslave Demon
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2048,0,0]=0x00000800 (mask0 bit11). No shared Warlock marker bits. Enslave Demon cast time -500ms/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Summon Felguard (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Demonic Empowerment (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Fel Synergy (2r, tier 7) — Your pet is healed 15/30% of damage you deal with Shadow/Fire spells. Proc-based pet heal, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Demonic Tactics (3r, tier 8) — Increases your pet's critical strike chance by 10/20/30% of your own. Passive stat scaling, not implementable as SpellMod.
Decimation (2r, tier 8) — When Shadow Bolt or Incinerate crits a target below 35% HP, next Soul Fire cast time reduced by 40/80%. HP-conditional proc, not implementable as SpellMod.
Molten Core (3r, tier 9) — Your Corruption ticks have a chance to reduce cast time and mana cost of next Incinerate by 10%/rank. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Metamorphosis (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
